name: saham-indonesia-analyzer
description: Analisa saham Indonesia (IDX) dengan Golden Cross, Bollinger Bands, RSI, dan Volume Breakout via GoAPI

scripts.dev: nodemon --watch server.js --watch indicators.js --watch public --ext js,html,css server.js
scripts.build: node -c server.js && node -c indicators.js && node -e "require('./server.js')" --check && echo Build OK
